method: Wilson score CI on each proportion. Inferential CI on the ratio uses Katz log-RR (log(RR) +/- 1.96*SE, SE=sqrt((1-p1)/k1 + (1-p2)/k2), exponentiated). The conservative bound pairs Wilson lower/upper on numerator/denominator (strictly wider than Katz; reported for transparency, not as an inferential CI).
